div.p: All checklist items passed. Results are statistically sound. Speedup ratios are meaningful.
CV > 10% or checklist failed. Results are noise. Must re-run with fixes.
✓ Disable turbo boost ✓ Set performance governor ✓ Pin to fixed frequency (e.g., 2.4GHz) ✓ Verify with cpupower frequency-info
✓ 3+ warmup iterations ✓ Populates CPU caches ✓ Stabilizes CPU state ✓ NOT included in timing
✓ Minimum 10 timed runs ✓ Recommended: 15 runs ✓ More runs = better statistics ✓ Captures timing variance
✓ Sort timing array ✓ Take middle value ✓ Robust to outliers ✓ NOT arithmetic mean
✓ Calculate variance ✓ sqrt(variance/n) ✓ Report in nanoseconds ✓ Shows measurement spread
CRITICAL QUALITY GATE CV = (stddev / median) × 100 ✓ CV < 2% = Valid measurement ⚠ CV 2-5% = Warning, investigate ✗ CV > 10% = Reject, re-run
✓ Use __attribute__((optimize("no-tree-vectorize"))) ✓ Or compile with -fno-tree-vectorize ✓ Ensures fair scalar comparison ✓ Prevents compiler cheating
